projectDescription: Barrett AI is an IT helpdesk chatbot for Barrett Hodgson Pakistan, powered by LangChain and Cerebras LLM, providing a FastAPI backend with a JavaScript embeddable widget for real-time streaming IT support.
keyFeatures: Real-time streaming chat responses via FastAPI StreamingResponse
Session-based conversation memory using LangChain ConversationBufferWindowMemory
LLM-powered IT support with Cerebras llama-3.3-70b model
Embeddable JavaScript chat widget for any web page
Automatic session expiry and cleanup after 3 minutes of inactivity
Chat history persistence to JSONL files organized by date and user
LRU cache for hostname lookups and in-memory LLM response caching
Abuse prevention with client-side rate limiting and block state
Rotating file logging with automatic old log cleanup
publicApiSurface: GET / — Health check returning client IP and hostname
GET /check-ip — Check if client IP is already stored
POST /store-ip — Store a client IP address
POST /reset-session — Clear session memory and mark session as expired
POST /chat — Send a message and receive a streaming or JSON response
StreamingHandler — LangChain callback handler for token streaming
FileOperationManager — Async batched file write manager
